required_input: six CP-06 formula strings and formula_hash values
materialization_rule: Materialize feature rows only in a future approved paper-only loop; this plan does not compute values.
pit_requirement: Each row must include feature_visible_at and feature_usable_from no later than decision timestamp.
label_isolation_requirement: No label columns may be read during feature construction.
missingness_policy: Missing input windows produce null feature values with explicit missing_reason; no future backfill.
feature_hash_requirement: feature_hash must hash formula_hash, operator_version, input fields, lookback metadata, PIT fields, and missingness policy.

materialization_rule: Required fields: sample_id, formula_hash, feature_hash, symbol, feature_date, date_group, feature_value, missing_reason, operator_version, parameter_summary.
pit_requirement: feature_visible_at, feature_usable_from, source_cutoff_time required for every row.
label_isolation_requirement: label_start_date and label_end_date may be stored for audit but cannot influence feature_value.
feature_hash_requirement: feature_hash cannot remain reserved after materialization.
notes: No feature table is created in this loop.

materialization_rule: Use only information available on or before feature_usable_from; no centered windows or future shifts.
pit_requirement: feature_visible_at <= feature_usable_from and feature_usable_from <= decision timestamp.
label_isolation_requirement: Purge and embargo windows are validation controls, not feature inputs.
missingness_policy: Rows outside PIT universe must be marked not_in_pit_universe rather than filled.
notes: PIT contract resolves CP-07 blocker only after future implementation.

materialization_rule: Feature construction must not read labels, future returns, validation results, or candidate outcomes.
pit_requirement: No label-derived fields may be dependencies of feature_value.
label_isolation_requirement: label_start_date, label_end_date, purge_window_days, embargo_window_days required for audit linkage.
missingness_policy: Missing labels must not affect feature existence or value.
feature_hash_requirement: feature_hash excludes label outcomes and includes label_horizon metadata only as audit contract.
notes: Prevents feature/label leakage before CP-09-style gates.

materialization_rule: Do not forward-fill or backfill from future rows; insufficient lookback remains null.
pit_requirement: Missingness must be determined using data visible at feature_usable_from.
label_isolation_requirement: Missingness policy must be applied before labels are joined.
missingness_policy: Track missing_input_count and lookback_available_count for every feature row.
notes: Addresses CP-07 missingness blocker as design only.

materialization_rule: Operator definitions must be versioned before any materialization.
pit_requirement: Operator inputs must be PIT-safe and bounded by lookback metadata.
label_isolation_requirement: Operators cannot reference target returns or future validation membership.
missingness_policy: Undefined operators produce null with operator_undefined missing_reason.
feature_hash_requirement: feature_hash includes operator_version and canonical formula string.
notes: No operator code is changed in this loop.

required_input: materialized feature table from future loop
materialization_rule: After future materialization, rerun an audit report before merge readiness changes.
pit_requirement: Audit must prove feature_visible_at, feature_usable_from, label isolation, missingness, formula_hash, and feature_hash.
label_isolation_requirement: Audit must keep post_cutoff_data_used_for_train=False unless future gate explicitly allows otherwise.
missingness_policy: Audit must report null rates by sample_id and date_group.
feature_hash_requirement: Audit must verify no reserved feature_hash remains.
notes: This row defines the next required action after the plan.

materialization_rule: No feature values are generated now; future materialization must be paper-only and audited before training readiness.
label_isolation_requirement: All label isolation fields required for audit only.
missingness_policy: Concrete missingness policy required before merge.
feature_hash_requirement: Final deterministic feature_hash required before merge.
notes: This plan resolves the design gap but not the materialized-feature blocker.
